name: Ithil-Berylthorn
personality: Shiny and serene, this ° dot-eyed cactus in a propeller beanie glows like a nightlight in the server room. Ithil-Berylthorn has infinite patience for broken builds — just don't let it plan the sprint, or everything sprawls into beautiful, unmergeable chaos.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
